# unifi_wifi_broadcasts (Data Source)

All WiFi broadcasts (SSIDs) on the site. Use it to resolve an SSID's UUID by name, e.g. to feed an import of an existing unifi_wifi_broadcast.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all SSIDs, e.g. to resolve an existing SSID's UUID for an import block
# without hand-hunting controller IDs.
data "unifi_wifi_broadcasts" "all" {}

locals {
  ssid_id = {
    for b in data.unifi_wifi_broadcasts.all.wifi_broadcasts : b.name => b.id
  }
}

import {
  to = unifi_wifi_broadcast.guest
  id = local.ssid_id["Guest WiFi"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `wifi_broadcasts` (Attributes List) The SSIDs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--wifi_broadcasts))

<a id="nestedatt--wifi_broadcasts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `wifi_broadcasts`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the SSID is enabled.
- `id` (String) WiFi broadcast UUID.
- `name` (String) SSID name.
- `origin` (String) Entity origin (e.g. USER, DERIVED).
- `type` (String) SSID kind (e.g. STANDARD).
